meta.description: Daily 9 AM IST. Fetches stale leads from v_digest_leads_stale_24h (mig 083) and groups them by assignee. ONE WhatsApp message per assignee listing all their stale leads inline (top 8, then +N more). Replaces the prior per-lead splitOut that fan-outed into 10-20 messages per morning — caused Meta rate-limit hits. If no stale leads, no messages fire. Empty result also possible if `assigned_employee_phone` is null on all rows.
